name: checkpoint-thread
description: Observe thread-scoped edits in shared Git workspaces, preserve checkpoints, and ship verified business changes without blocking normal tools.

interface.shortDescription: Attribute and checkpoint shared Git work.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight skill plus fail-open synchronous Hooks that observe which thread and goal changed repository content without locking the branch or controlling normal Git use, preserve recoverable checkpoints, and organize verified changes into commits.
defaultPrompt: Use checkpoint-thread to make and ship this repository change safely.
